name: Post Planner
description:
Post Planner’s focus on discovering, planning, and publishing content helps users reach their social media engagement goals. The platform makes it simple to find high-quality, relevant content for users’ social feeds - so they can share posts that resonate with their target audience and drive interaction.

Key Features

  • Content discovery is easy with Post Planner’s content recommendation engine, which suggests high-engagement content based on keywords, themes, or industries.
  • Post scheduling and publishing features allow users to schedule posts in advance across platforms. 
  • Post Planner gives a performance rating to every piece of content, assessing it for potential engagement and helping users craft impactful posts.
  • A custom post plan lets users create plans for different types of content, ensuring a balanced and strategic mix of content pillars and forms.

Usability

Post Planner's interface is designed with simplicity in mind, making it easy for users to navigate the platform and manage their content successfully. The platform's focus on content discovery and scheduling saves users hours of time and effort. 

Platform Compatibility

  • Facebook
  • X (Twitter)
  • Instagram
  • LinkedIn
  • Pinterest

Post Planner Pricing

  • Starter Plan: $3/month for 1 user and up to 3 social accounts.
  • Love Plan: $11/month for 1 user and up to 10 social accounts.
  • Guru Plan: $24/month for 1 user and up to 25 social accounts.

Customer Support

Support operates via email and an online help center that includes FAQs and tutorials. Overall, Post Planner does a great job illustrating features and helping users maximize their ROI using the platform.

Power Users

  • Small businesses and freelancers looking to save time on content creation.
  • Social media managers who need an efficient platform to execute in-house social media management. 
  • Content creators who want inspiration and high-engagement content ideas to share with their audience.

Post Planner’s Additional Features

  • Bulk upload capabilities let users upload and schedule multiple posts at once. 
  • The platform’s star rating system rates content on a 5-star scale for predicted engagement, assisting in decision-making.
  • Team collaboration is simple with built-in content approval processes and collaborative scheduling.
  • Post Planner helps users recycle top performing posts, identifying and recycling users’ best-performing content.

Post Planner's strength lies in its ability to simplify content discovery and scheduling. Its strategic approach to content sharing makes it a favorite among content creators and social media managers alike.

‍
